title: Vlccs Entering The Sinokor Era
summary:
Main
Sinokor has positioned itself as the single largest VLCC commercial operator - a scale that materially alters the competitive structure of the segment. Executive Overview
Global VLCC fleet capacity is projected to expand more aggressively through 2028. Scheduled deliveries from all major shipbuilding countries imply an average annual VLCC fleet growth rate of approximately 6% by 2028, assuming the current orderbook is delivered as planned.

children.title: Main
children.summary:
Sinokor has positioned itself as the single largest VLCC commercial operator - a scale that materially alters the competitive structure of the segment. Executive Overview
Global VLCC fleet capacity is projected to expand more aggressively through 2028.

children.title: Sinokor's Strategic Expansion
children.summary: Over the past few months, it has been widely reported that Sinokor has embarked on an aggressive expansion in the VLCC segment, targeting both secondhand acquisitions and time-charter arrangements. Market chatter intensified in mid-December, pointing to a notable uptick in tanker S&P activity.

children.title: Mapping the New VLCC Commercial Order
section_path: Mapping the New VLCC Commercial Order
children.section_path_text: Mapping the New VLCC Commercial Order
children.summary: The objective of this analysis is to quantify the impact of recent acquisitions on the ownership structure of the VLCC market and to place Sinokor's positioning in a historical context. For this assessment, the VLCC fleet includes only active, compliant, non-sanctioned vessels with identified commercial operators.

children.title: Unprecedented Concentration in the VLCC Spot Market
section_path: Unprecedented Concentration in the VLCC Spot Market
children.section_path_text: Unprecedented Concentration in the VLCC Spot Market
children.summary: Sinokor's expansion is most visible in the spot market, where commercial concentration has reached historic levels. Until the end of 2023, Tankers International led the segment, consistently controlling around 15% of the spot-trading VLCC fleet.

children.title: Sinokor Fleet Age Profile vs. Major VLCC Operators
section_path: Sinokor Fleet Age Profile vs. Major VLCC Operators
children.section_path_text: Sinokor Fleet Age Profile vs. Major VLCC Operators
children.summary: A notable feature of Sinokor's recent acquisitions is the age profile of the vessels, with a large portion concentrated around 14 years. This points to a strategy focused on the short- to medium-term outlook of the VLCC market, particularly in an environment shaped by sanctioned tonnage and tightening fundamentals.

children.title: Sinokor's Expanding Role and the Spot Market Reinforcement Effect
section_path: Sinokor's Expanding Role and the Spot Market Reinforcement Effect
children.section_path_text: Sinokor's Expanding Role and the Spot Market Reinforcement Effect
children.summary: Sinokor's recent acquisition strategy reflects a clear emphasis on near- to medium-term spot dynamics. By prioritizing mid- to older-aged vessels, typically available at a discount to modern tonnage, Sinokor has been able to increase fleet exposure without a proportional rise in capital deployed.
